nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Abijah, and his ways and his words are written in the treatise of the prophet Iddo.

esv.text: The rest of the acts of Abijah, his ways and his sayings, are written in the story of the prophet Iddo.

cnv.text: 亞比雅其餘的事蹟和他的言行，都記在易多先知的傳記上。

ccb.text: 亚比雅其余的事及其言行都记在易多先知的史记上。
